courses.title: Critical Race and Ethnic Studies: An Introduction

notes: PREPARATION FOR THE MINOR One lower-division core course: CRES 68: Approaches to Black Studies (recommended) OR CRES 10: Critical Race and Ethnic Studies: An Introduction Please visit the Critical Race & Ethnic Studies website to learn more about this minor.

UC Santa Cruz students may choose to complete one or more minors, provided they can finish all required coursework within their maximum enrollment terms and allowable credits. While a minor will appear on a student's official transcript, it will not be listed on their diploma. Pursuing a minor is a personal decision that should align with a student's educational and career goals. Students do not apply for minors when submitting their application to UC Santa Cruz. After enrolling, transfer students interested in pursuing a minor should contact the department offering the minor for guidance.
